ModMetaData.name: Harmony Patch Scanner for RimWorld
ModMetaData.author: TadasTheLithuanian, ported by b0nk
ModMetaData.description:
Harmony Patch Scanner is an in-game RimWorld modder utility for listing all loaded Harmony patches, identifying methods patched by multiple mods, and exporting readable diagnostic reports.
This RimWorld version preserves the core behavior of the Bannerlord Harmony Patch Scanner by TadasTheLithuanian while using RimWorld's mod settings UI and load-order APIs.
